message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Secure Map Reduce 2 - Shuffle Service Token Flow

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 1
  MessageAlign left
}
skinparam participantPadding 40
skinparam boxPadding 10

participant "Client\n(c)" as c #E6E6F2
participant "Resource\nManager\n(rm)" as rm #E6E6F2
participant "Node\nManager\n(nm)" as nm #E6E6F2
participant "Shuffle\nHandler\n(ss)" as ss #E6E6F2
participant "File\nSystem\n(fs)" as fs #E6E6F2

== Bootstrap ==
== Job Definition ==

c -> rm : 1 createJob [ ... ] ()\n: job-id

c -> c : 2 createShuffleToken\n( shfl-tkn-mk )\n: shfl-tkn
c -> c : 3 serializeTokens\n( shfl-tkn, ... )\n: c-tokens{shfl-tkn,...}

== Job Submission ==

c -> rm : 4 submitApplication\n[ ... ]\n( job-id, c-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )\n: app-rpt{clnt-tkn}

== Job Initiation ==

rm -> nm : 5 startContainer\n[ ... ]\n( c-tokens{shfl-tkn},svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )

nm -> ss : 6 initApp\n( job-id, shfl-tkn )

participant "Application\nMaster\n(am)" as am #E6E6F2
nm -> am : 7 exec

am -> nm : 8 startContainer\n[ ... ]\n( svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )

participant "Application\nContainer\n(ac)" as ac #FF0000
nm -> ac : 9 exec

participant "Task\n(t)" as t #F5A623
ac -> t : 10 exec

== Map Task Execution ==

t -> fs : 11 writeShuffleData[][() :

== Reduce Task Execution ==

activate ss
ss -> ss : 12 readShuffleData [SDT:shfl-tkn] (...): shfl-data
ss -> fs : 13 readShuffleData
ss --> t : 14 shfl-data
deactivate ss

== Job Completion ==

@enduml
```
